compiled_state.description:
# Correct completion-gate child-closure docs (superseded by 30c2ef3ad)

## What
Commit `30c2ef3ad` split "uncertified child" from "blocking child": only an UNCLOSED direct child
is now a deterministic FAIL; a closed-but-uncertified (force-closed) child lets the parent close
UNSIGNED with `certifiable=false` (the LLM still runs on the parent's own criteria). The docs still
describe the old semantics.

Files/lines to correct:
- `docs/llm-framework.md:381-395` — "any child not closed+certified -> FAIL without the LLM" /
  "LLM only reached once all children are closed+signed" (both now false); document `certifiable`.
- `docs/llm-framework.md:424-427`, `docs/workflow-engine.md:35-37`, `CLAUDE.md` completion-gate
  section — the "unsigned close ⇒ validation did not pass" biconditional (now has 2-3 causes).
- `src/rebar/llm/workflow/gates/completion-verification.yaml:5-6` — description contradicts its own ops.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `llm-framework.md` child-closure section rewritten around blocking vs certification-withholding;
      the `certifiable` verdict field documented.
- [ ] The "unsigned close" claim qualified in all three docs (PASS signs iff certifiable).
- [ ] The gate YAML description corrected; commit carries a `rebar-ticket:` trailer.
compiled_state.title: Correct completion-gate child-closure docs (superseded by 30c2ef3ad)
